A stunning 3-bedroom spa apartment with breathtaking mountain views, private balconies, ensuite bathrooms and access to a sauna, hammam, jacuzzi, fitness room and ski return.
Blending elegance, warmth and comfort, this mountain haven offers the perfect wellness escape near golf, slopes, and Megève’s most beautiful scenery.

properties.fullDescription:

-This warm 28 m² hideaway blends alpine wood with practical comfort: bright lounge, sofa-bed and bunk nook, neat bathroom, and a fully equipped kitchenette for easy meals. 
-Clip in outside, glide to the lifts, and ski back home at day’s end. 
-Shops, rentals, ski school and après are just steps away. 
-A cozy, family-friendly base with Wi-Fi, ski locker and everything you need for effortless mountain days.

properties.fullDescription: Stay in our beautifully renovated apartment at Le Tikal, a vacation residence in Val Thorens. Sleeps 8, with 3 bedrooms (2 bunk beds, 2 single beds, 1 master bedroom with queen-size bed) and a sofa bed. Enjoy 2 bathrooms, fully equipped kitchen, TV, Wi-Fi, sound system, washing machine, dishwasher. Ski in ski out, 2 ski lockers with boot dryers. Located on Rue du Soleil, with balcony and small terrace. Beautiful common areas, ideal for families and friends.
